prompt:
Use case: stylized-concept
Asset type: setup screen background for a fantasy tactics game
Primary request: create a new Renations war council backdrop for the setup screen
Scene/background: a ruined highland war council terrace overlooking a solemn frontier kingdom, with broken chapel arches, hanging faction banners, candlelit map tables, distant fortress silhouettes, and a storm-burnished sky
Subject: the battlefield must feel like a sacred command post rather than a generic castle vista
Style/medium: painterly pixel-art-inspired 2D environment matte, moody late-90s / early-2000s strategy RPG look, matching the existing Renations runtime art rather than glossy concept art
Composition/framing: wide environmental composition designed to crop well to 16:9, strong large shapes, readable depth layers, open midground space for UI overlays, no dominant character focal point
Lighting/mood: dusk war-room atmosphere, ember-lit, solemn, martial, slightly tragic, with warm firelight against cold stone and distant haze
Color palette: parchment ivory, brass, dark wine, worn stone gray, moss green, ember orange, pale gold, ash violet
Materials/textures: cracked masonry, weathered banners, worn flagstones, drifting smoke haze, soft painted cloud bands
Quality: high
Constraints: no characters, no text, no UI, no modern objects, no oversharpening, no glossy 3D, no anime key art, no excessive clutter; keep the image readable behind interface panels
Avoid: photorealism, neon fantasy, cartoon exaggeration, flat empty sky, busy tiny detail everywhere

Use case: stylized-concept
Asset type: map-specific background art for the Broken Chapel battlefield window and battle plaque
Primary request: create a Broken Chapel environment backdrop
Scene/background: the shattered remains of a rose-window chapel on a ridge, with broken nave arches, cliffside flagstones, fallen masonry, hanging torn standards, and distant mountain valleys beyond
Subject: the chapel ruin and ridge approach must be the clear focal read for this battlefield
Style/medium: painterly pixel-art-inspired 2D environment matte for a tactics RPG, matching existing Renations backgrounds and terrain mood
Composition/framing: wide establishing shot that crops cleanly inside a plaque window, foreground stone platform and rubble, midground chapel ruin, distant ridge layers; no characters
Lighting/mood: sunset afterglow with tragic sacred atmosphere, warm sky light behind cold ruined stone, restrained ember accents only
Color palette: worn stone gray, muted moss, chapel gold, dark wine banner red, sunset amber, ash brown, distant violet haze
Materials/textures: broken carved stone, cracked flagstone, torn fabric, rough cliff edges, layered cloud banks
Quality: high
Constraints: no characters, no text, no UI, no extra buildings stealing focus, no oversized empty padding, no modern props; keep the image readable when cropped and partially obscured by overlay text
Avoid: photorealism, glossy 3D, bright cartoon color, anime scenic glamour, dense micro-detail noise

Use case: stylized-concept
Asset type: map-specific background art for the Ashen Causeway battlefield window and battle plaque
Primary request: create an Ashen Causeway environment backdrop
Scene/background: a broad sanctum causeway of scorched stone spanning a deep ravine, lined with battered braziers, broken reliquary pillars, ash-blown masonry, and a looming sacred crossing under a smoke-heavy sky
Subject: the raised causeway and sanctum crossing must read instantly as the battlefield identity
Style/medium: painterly pixel-art-inspired 2D environment matte for a moody fantasy tactics RPG, consistent with Renations terrain and backdrop art
Composition/framing: wide establishing shot designed for 16:9 cropping, strong foreground stone path leading into the sanctum crossing, readable large forms, no characters
Lighting/mood: ember-lit dusk with ash in the air, solemn military pressure, warm brazier light against cold volcanic haze, grand but restrained
Color palette: ash brown, scorched stone gray, muted chapel gold, ember orange, brass, soot black, desaturated crimson, pale smoke teal in the distance only if needed
Materials/textures: heat-worn flagstones, cracked pillars, soot-stained masonry, drifting ash, faint sanctum glow
Quality: high
Constraints: no characters, no text, no UI, no lava fantasy spectacle, no modern ruins, no oversized empty sky, no cluttered props; preserve a grounded tactical read instead of a cinematic illustration poster
Avoid: photorealism, glossy 3D, exaggerated volcano scene, neon magic, anime scenic rendering, busy tiny detail everywhere
